task_completion.description: Open the print dialog in the dive log application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Print' dialog window is visible over the main dive log application interface.
Inside the Print dialog, the selected template or layout option is explicitly set to either 'Table print' or 'Two dives per page'.

task_completion.description: Configure the print job to output as a PDF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The selected printer or output destination is set to 'Print to File', 'Save as PDF', or a similar PDF generation option.

task_completion.description: Specify the correct file name and directory for the PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save file dialog shows the file name set to 'printed_log.pdf' and the destination directory set to '/home/ga/Documents'.

task_completion.description: Verify the PDF was successfully created in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window shows 'printed_log.pdf' inside the 'Documents' folder, or a PDF viewer is open showing the generated dive log document.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to generate the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the dive log application's print menus and dialogs, rather than terminal commands executing PDF conversion scripts.

integrity.description: The output appears to be a genuinely rendered PDF from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the PDF is visible, it features a structured layout matching 'Table print' or 'Two dives per page' templates, rather than plain text or a manually typed document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or word processor to fake the dive log output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like gedit, nano, or LibreOffice Writer) are seen being used to manually type dive site names like 'Sund Rock' or 'Yellow House'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/printed_log.pdf'. The generated PDF must be at least 1024 bytes in size. The real dive log dataset contains the keywords 'Sund Rock', 'Yellow House', and 'Hoodsport', which may be visible in the generated PDF. The keyword 'Washington' is not present in the dataset (it uses 'WA' instead), so 'Washington' should not appear in the output.
